arts.ttl: Manchester United seal €30m signing of Lecce wing-back Patrick Dorgu
arts.sum: Denmark international signs deal until June 2020 Dorgu ‘cannot wait to work with Ruben Amorim’ Manchester United have completed the signing of Patrick Dorgu from Lecce, subject to visa and registration. The Denmark international has signed a contract until June 2030, with the option of an additional year. Dorgu, who can play as a left-back, right-back or further forward on the flanks, has played 57 games for Lecce, contributing five goals. United have paid an initial €30m fee (£25.1m) with up to €5m (£4.2m) payable in bonuses. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News: Red Devils officially complete Patrick Dorgu signing
arts.sum: Man Utd have announced that they have signed Lecce star Patrick Dorgu, with the deal thought to be worth €30 million plus €5m in bonuses. OFFICIAL: Man Utd complete Patrick Dorgu transfer

arts.ttl: Patrick Dorgu: Manchester United confirm first new major signing of Ruben Amorim era
arts.sum: Red Devils welcome first new face under Portuguese manager

arts.ttl: Man Utd sign Lecce defender Dorgu
arts.sum: Manchester United sign Denmark defender Patrick Dorgu from Lecce on a five-and-a-half-year deal.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Crystal Palace LIVE: Premier League updates, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's side bid to maintain good form

arts.ttl: Manchester United announce signing of Patrick Dorgu
arts.sum: The 20-year-old left-back becomes the second signing of the Ruben Amorim era
Manchester United have completed the signing of Lecce defender Patrick Dorgu in a deal worth £30 million.

arts.ttl: Manchester United squad members vs Crystal Palace confirmed as youngster promoted
arts.sum: Man Utd are set to play Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Sunday and the players have arrived at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Manchester United suffer blow to backroom staff as key member leaves to work with Ole Gunnar Solskjaer at Besiktas
arts.sum: Manchester United have lost a key member of their backroom staff after they elected to move to a role with Ole Gunnar Solskjaer's Besiktas in Turkey.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel's stance on Marcus Rashford's England future amid Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's hopes of an England return are very much alive with Thomas Tuchel now at the helm as the ex-Chelsea manager remains an admirer of the forward
